title: A Shanghai Bride
overview: Two slackers that struggle to survive in the streets of modern China will face many problems when they are hired by a ghost to take a coffin, stolen from the local cemetery, across the big city of Shanghai in order to reunite a couple of lovers in the afterlife.

trailers.title: UNA NOVIA DE SHANGHAI // Estreno 29 de Septiembre
